title: stachys rotundifolia
intro: Stachys rotundifolia, also known as Round-leaved Woundwort, is a perennial plant species belonging to the mint family (Lamiaceae) that is native to Europe and Western Asia. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it useful in treating wounds, cuts, and other skin irritations. The health benefits of Stachys rotundifolia include reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing, as well as exhibiting antimicrobial properties that can help combat infections. Stachys rotundifolia can be prepared as a herbal tea or infusion, and it is also used in traditional medicine as a tincture or ointment to treat various skin conditions.
